title: dendrocereus undulosus subsp. nudiflorus
intro: Dendrocereus undulosus subsp. nudiflorus, commonly known as Night-blooming Cereus, is a cactus species that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The Night-blooming Cereus has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the Night-blooming Cereus can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
